general.description: Account-level preferences live here. The General item in the sidebar now maps directly to this scrolling page instead of splitting into separate pages.

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Profile details, avatar, and identity information

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Alerts, digests, and async collaboration signals
notifications.placeholderDescription: This area is a good home for inbox reminder intensity, digest cadence, and cross-tool notification preferences. Keeping it inside General preserves one personal preference path.

highlights.quietHours: Quiet hours and personal attention thresholds

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language used across Synaply.
language.selectorDescription: Applied to navigation, notifications, and product copy.

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.description: Workspace rules, identity, and permission boundaries
workspace.placeholderDescription: This is a natural home for the workspace name, default collaboration rules, cross-project constraints, and member visibility. Keeping the structure here means we will not have to split the page again when the real fields arrive.

teams.label: Teams
teams.description: Team list, creation entry, and team settings navigation

members.label: Members
members.description: Member roles, permissions, and removal actions

aiExecution.label: AI execution
aiExecution.description: AI actions, confirmation policy, and audit history

security.label: Security
security.description: Account security, sign-in policy, and audit entry points
security.placeholderDescription: Security settings fit naturally beside members and workspace rules. When device sessions, sign-in management, and audit logs arrive, this area will stay coherent.

application.label: Application
application.description: Client, integration, and platform behavior preferences
application.placeholderDescription: This section is reserved for app-wide behavior such as desktop, mobile, and third-party connection settings. Keeping it inside Administration makes it feel like team operating configuration.

billing.label: Billing
billing.placeholderDescription: Billing, plan details, and seat information naturally belong together with workspace administration, so we do not need to maintain a separate billing page structure later.

errors.bucketMissing: The avatar storage bucket does not exist yet. Run the Supabase migration or create the avatars bucket in Storage first.
errors.storageBlocked: The avatar upload was blocked by the Storage policy. Please make sure you are signed in and try again with the latest code.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.syncAuthFailed: Failed to sync the sign-in profile.

validation.invalidType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP avatars are supported.
validation.fileTooLarge: The avatar must be smaller than 3 MB.

toasts.uploadSuccess: Avatar uploaded. Click Save changes to apply it to your profile.
toasts.markRemoveAvatar: Avatar removal is marked. Click Save changes to apply it.

states.authRequiredDescription: Sign in before uploading an avatar or editing your profile.
states.loadFailedDescription: We could not read your profile right now.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload a clear avatar so teammates can recognize you across comments, chat, and collaboration views.
avatar.recommendation: A square image usually works best.
avatar.statusUploading: The avatar is still uploading. Please wait a moment.
avatar.statusUploaded: Avatar {fileName} is uploaded. Click Save changes to apply it.
avatar.statusMarked: Avatar removal is marked and will apply after saving.
avatar.statusHint: Choose an image to upload it immediately. After the upload succeeds, click Save changes to apply it to your profile.

info.title: Basic information
info.description: You can update the display name here. The sign-in email stays read-only for now.
info.displayNamePlaceholder: Choose a name your team will recognize easily
info.clean: Your profile is already up to date.

noTeam.title: Team member management
noTeam.description: This area is only available inside a team workspace.
noTeam.body: Switch to a team workspace before managing member roles.

notOwner.title: Permission required
notOwner.description: Only the OWNER can manage team members.
notOwner.body: Contact the team owner if you need a member role changed.

list.title: Member list
list.description: Manage team member roles and permissions. Only the OWNER can update roles or remove members.
list.loadFailed: Failed to load the member list.
list.selfRestriction: You cannot change your own role or remove yourself.

removeDialog.title: Remove this team member?
removeDialog.description: “{name}” will be removed from the current team. They will lose access to the projects, tasks, and docs inside this team workspace.

appearance.title: Background glow
appearance.description: Control the global ambient glow colors and motion. Preferences are stored locally for the account and workspace separately.

glow.label: Fixed glow
glow.description: Soft light blooms stay close to fixed anchor points, ideal for low-distraction backgrounds.

aurora.label: Aurora
aurora.description: Simulates layered aurora curtains that drift slowly when motion is enabled.

ribbon.label: Ribbon
ribbon.description: Wider diagonal light bands sweep across the background for a more energetic atmosphere.

prism.label: Prism
prism.description: Layered refracted color bands cut across the surface for a sharper technical feel.

appearance.enabledDescription: When disabled, the ambient light is not rendered and the page background stays solid.
appearance.animatedDescription: When enabled, the selected glow moves slowly. When disabled, it remains static and still respects the system reduced-motion preference.

teams.description: All teams you belong to are listed here. Open any team to jump into its team settings. Owners and admins can keep editing profile details and member permissions there.
teams.loadFailedDescription: We could not read the team list right now.
teams.emptyTitle: You do not have a team yet
teams.emptyDescription: Create your first team here and we will automatically create the matching team workspace.

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update the team profile.
errors.bucketMissing: The avatar storage bucket does not exist yet. Create the avatars bucket in Supabase Storage first.
errors.storageBlocked: The team avatar upload was blocked by the Storage policy. The upload path now matches the current policy shape. Refresh and try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload the team avatar.

validation.invalidType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP team avatars are supported.
validation.fileTooLarge: The team avatar must be smaller than 3 MB.
validation.uploadPending: The avatar is still uploading. Please wait before saving.
validation.permissionDenied: Only the team owner or an admin can edit team details.

toasts.uploadSuccess: Team avatar uploaded. Click Save changes to apply it.
toasts.markRemoveAvatar: Avatar removal is marked. Click Save changes to apply it.

states.missingTeamDescription: The teamId is missing, so the team details cannot be loaded.
states.authRequiredDescription: Sign in before viewing or managing the team details.
states.loadFailedDescription: We could not read the team details right now.

hero.description: The team profile and identity details live here. Only the team owner and admins can change the team name and avatar.

permissionBanner.message: Your current role is {role}. You can view the team details, but only the owner or admins can save changes.

onboarding.title: Collaboration setup
onboarding.description: New teams work best when the initial handoff path is explicit: invite the people involved, then create the first project and workflow that will hold the work.

invite.title: Invite teammates
invite.description: Bring the core collaborators into this team workspace first. Current members: {count}.

project.title: Create the first project
project.description: Use a project to define scope, ownership, and the working context for the team. Current projects: {count}.

workflow.title: Create the first workflow
workflow.description: Make review, handoff, and blocked states visible with a shared workflow template. Current workflows: {count}.

avatar.title: Team avatar
avatar.description: The team avatar appears in workspace switching, settings, and team-facing collaboration views.
avatar.recommendation: A clear brand mark or team emblem usually works best.
avatar.statusUploading: The team avatar is still uploading. Please wait a moment.
avatar.statusUploaded: Team avatar {fileName} is uploaded. Click Save changes to apply it.
avatar.statusMarked: Avatar removal is marked and will apply after saving.
avatar.statusHint: Choose an image to upload it immediately. After the upload succeeds, click Save changes to apply it to the team profile.

info.title: Basic information
info.description: You can rename the team at any time. The creation time and member count are read-only reference fields.
info.readOnly: This account currently has read-only access.
info.clean: Team details are already up to date.

aiExecution.title: AI execution layer
aiExecution.description: Open a workspace first before configuring AI execution.

capabilities.title: Capabilities and permissions
capabilities.description: This is not the chat surface. It is the shared capability layer that AI uses before it calls real system actions. Every action declares its approval mode, target type, and current role availability so every model uses the same contract.
capabilities.loadFailed: Failed to load the capability list.

workbench.title: Action workbench
workbench.description: Use the same AI action API for previewing, confirming, and running actions so the whole path is validated first.
workbench.invalidPayload: The input must be a JSON object.
workbench.parseFailed: Failed to parse the JSON input.

history.title: Recent execution
history.description: Every preview, success, failure, and block is recorded in the audit history.
history.empty: There is no execution history yet. Start with a preview in the left workbench.
